leagueBriefing: Conference tournament season reached a fever pitch on Friday as blue bloods solidified their resumes while several bubble teams saw their hopes flicker out in dramatic fashion.

games.headline: Duke stifles Clemson to punch ticket to ACC title game
games.brief: Duke looked every bit the top seed in the ACC Tournament, using a suffocating first-half defensive effort to build a lead that Clemson simply couldn't overcome. The Blue Devils controlled the paint and the tempo, ensuring their rival never got within striking distance during the closing minutes of the semifinal clash.
bullets: Duke held Clemson to just 22 points in the first half.
The Blue Devils outscored the Tigers in the paint 38-24.
Clemson struggled from deep, shooting just 26% from beyond the arc.
Duke advances to face Virginia in the ACC Championship game.
games.context: Duke secures a spot in the ACC final as they hunt for a potential #1 seed in the Big Dance.

games.headline: Arizona survives Iowa State rally to reach Big 12 final
games.brief: In a heavyweight Big 12 battle, Arizona narrowly escaped an Iowa State comeback attempt that came down to the final possession. The Wildcats' backcourt depth proved to be the difference, matching the Cyclones' trademark defensive intensity with clinical late-game execution.
bullets: Arizona led by 8 with under three minutes to play before Iowa State's late surge.
The Cyclones forced 15 turnovers but couldn't convert the final look at the rim.
Arizona shot 52% from the field compared to Iowa State's 44%.
This win marks Arizona's first Big 12 title game appearance since joining the league.
games.context: Arizona advances to face Houston for the Big 12 tournament crown.

games.headline: Michigan edges rival Ohio State to advance in Big Ten tourney
games.brief: The latest chapter of this rivalry was a gritty, low-scoring affair where Michigan's poise down the stretch made the difference. Ohio State kept it tight until the final horn, but the Wolverines' ability to get to the free-throw line in the second half stifled the Buckeyes' momentum.
bullets: Michigan went 14-of-16 from the charity stripe in the second half.
Ohio State led by as many as 5 points early in the second period.
The Wolverines held the Buckeyes to zero fast-break points in the final ten minutes.
Michigan moves on to the Big Ten semifinals.
games.context: Michigan keeps their hopes for a high NCAA seed alive while Ohio State waits for a likely NIT bid.

games.headline: Florida bites back as Kentucky falls in SEC quarterfinals
games.brief: Florida's size in the paint was too much for the young Wildcats to handle in Nashville. The Gators dominated the boards and neutralized Kentucky's transition game, handing the Wildcats an early exit and raising questions about their seeding for the upcoming NCAA tournament.
bullets: Florida outrebounded Kentucky 42-29, including 15 offensive boards.
Kentucky was held to its lowest scoring output in three weeks.
The Gators went on a 12-2 run midway through the second half to pull away.
Florida reaches the SEC semifinals for the first time in three seasons.
games.context: Florida strengthens its resume for a top-4 seed while Kentucky drops to the SEC's middle tier.

games.headline: Houston dismantles Kansas in statement Big 12 win
games.brief: In what was expected to be a clash of titans, Houston turned it into a clinic. The Cougars' relentless defense held Kansas to an abysmal 47 points—one of the lowest marks in the Bill Self era—sending a clear message to the rest of the country that the road to the title runs through Houston.
bullets: Kansas shot a season-low 31% from the field.
Houston led by double digits for the final 24 minutes of the game.
The Cougars forced 18 turnovers and scored 22 points off them.
Houston has now won 10 straight games against ranked opponents.
games.context: Houston enters the Big 12 final as the heavy favorite for the #1 overall seed in the NCAA Tournament.

games.headline: UConn cruise past Georgetown to set up Big East final showdown
games.brief: UConn's quest for a repeat Big East title stayed on track as they methodically dismantled Georgetown. Freshman Braylon Mullins led the charge, scoring 15 early points to silence a pro-Hoyas contingent at the Garden and set up a highly anticipated final against St. John's.
bullets: Braylon Mullins finished with a game-high 21 points.
UConn held Georgetown to just 30% shooting in the first half.
The Huskies recorded 11 blocks, a tournament high for the team.
UConn advances to face Rick Pitino and St. John's in the final.
games.context: The Huskies are one win away from back-to-back Big East Tournament titles.

games.headline: UCLA outlasts Michigan State in high-scoring Big Ten shootout
games.brief: In a game that felt more like an NBA track meet, UCLA's efficient perimeter shooting allowed them to withstand a furious second-half rally from Tom Izzo's squad. The Bruins showed incredible toughness on the road, hitting clutch free throws to end the Spartans' tournament run.
bullets: UCLA shot 54% from the floor, including 10 three-pointers.
Michigan State scored 51 points in the second half but couldn't close the gap.
The Bruins led by as many as 15 in the first half.
This is UCLA's deepest conference tournament run since joining the Big Ten.
games.context: UCLA moves into the semifinals to face Purdue in a marquee matchup.

games.headline: Wisconsin wins overtime thriller to stun Illinois
games.brief: Wisconsin and Illinois delivered the game of the night in the Big Ten, an overtime epic that saw multiple lead changes in the final minute. The Badgers' composure in the extra period allowed them to upset the higher-seeded Illini and keep their late-season momentum rolling.
bullets: The game featured 12 ties and 15 lead changes.
Wisconsin outscored Illinois 13-10 in the overtime period.
Illinois shot over 50% from the field but missed two critical late free throws.
Badgers move on to the Big Ten semifinals after the upset.
games.context: Wisconsin boosts their NCAA seeding while Illinois likely drops to a 3 or 4 seed.

games.headline: Virginia's defense smothers Miami to reach ACC final
games.brief: Virginia turned back the clock with a dominant defensive performance that completely neutralized Miami's high-octane offense. The Cavaliers controlled the glass and the pace from the opening tip, setting up a clash of styles in the championship game against Duke.
bullets: Virginia held Miami to a season-low 23 points in the first half.
The Cavaliers shot an uncharacteristic 48% from three-point range.
Virginia committed only 4 turnovers throughout the entire game.
Miami's star backcourt was held to 9-of-28 shooting combined.
games.context: Virginia faces Duke in a rematch for the ACC Championship.

games.headline: Purdue muscles past Nebraska to reach Big Ten semis
games.brief: Purdue's interior dominance was simply too much for a game Nebraska squad. The Boilermakers used their size advantage to control the boards and create second-chance opportunities, pulling away in the second half to keep their hopes of a #1 seed alive.
bullets: Purdue outscored Nebraska 44-22 in the paint.
Nebraska was held to just 28 points in both halves.
The Boilermakers grabbed 14 offensive rebounds.
Purdue moves on to face UCLA in the Big Ten semifinals.
games.context: Purdue remains in the hunt for a #1 seed in the NCAA Tournament.

games.headline: St. John's holds off Seton Hall to reach Big East final
games.brief: Madison Square Garden was rocking as Rick Pitino's St. John's squad punched their ticket to the Big East final. Despite a late push from Seton Hall, the Red Storm's defensive pressure forced critical turnovers late, sealing a date with UConn for the trophy.
bullets: St. John's forced 16 turnovers, leading to 19 points.
Seton Hall trimmed a 15-point lead down to 4 late in the game.
The Red Storm shot 90% from the free-throw line in the final two minutes.
This is St. John's first Big East final appearance in over two decades.
games.context: A legendary Big East final awaits between St. John's and UConn.

games.headline: Ole Miss shocks Alabama in SEC quarterfinal upset
games.brief: In the biggest shock of the SEC Tournament so far, Ole Miss knocked off top-seeded Alabama on a last-second bucket. The Rebels played with desperation, knowing their NCAA hopes depended on it, while the Crimson Tide struggled to find their rhythm from deep in a hostile Nashville environment.
bullets: Ole Miss won on a contested layup with 2.4 seconds remaining.
Alabama shot a season-worst 22% from three-point range (7-of-32).
The Rebels overcame a 6-point deficit in the final three minutes.
Ole Miss moves into the SEC semifinals as the tournament's 'Cinderella'.
games.context: Ole Miss keeps their bubble hopes alive with a massive Quad 1 win.

games.headline: Arkansas holds off Oklahoma rally in SEC nail-biter
games.brief: Arkansas survived a late flurry of three-pointers from Oklahoma to secure their spot in the SEC semifinals. The Razorbacks used a balanced scoring attack and physical play inside to maintain the lead, though the Sooners had a chance to tie it at the buzzer that fell just short.
bullets: Arkansas led by 10 with 90 seconds remaining before a flurry of OU threes.
The Razorbacks scored 44 points in the second half to secure the win.
Oklahoma's final three-point attempt hit the back of the rim as time expired.
Arkansas advances to face Vanderbilt in the semifinals.
games.context: Arkansas solidifies their NCAA standing, while Oklahoma moves to the bubble's edge.

games.headline: Vanderbilt pulls away from Tennessee in SEC quarterfinals
games.brief: Vanderbilt continued its late-season surge by knocking off in-state rival Tennessee in front of a partisan crowd. The Commodores' second-half adjustments neutralized the Vols' physical defense, allowing Vandy to pull away in the final five minutes for a statement win.
bullets: Vanderbilt outscored Tennessee 44-37 in the second half.
Tennessee was held to just 31% shooting in the final ten minutes.
The Commodores went 18-of-22 from the free-throw line.
Vanderbilt reaches the SEC semifinals for the second time in three years.
games.context: Vanderbilt moves into the semifinals to face Arkansas, eyes a potential tournament crown.
